summary: Subscription Plan Sync testing complete. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Frontend: Account & Billing Hub correctly displays tier options with prices from centralized config. The 'Handshake' fix successfully prevents Zombie Subscriptions by using subscriptionPlans.config.js as SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH.
critical_code_review_comments: Centralized config at /app/frontend/src/config/subscriptionPlans.config.js correctly defines all tier prices
Backend SURFER_SUBSCRIPTION_TIERS matches frontend config: Free=$0, Basic=$4.99, Premium=$14.99
Backend GROM_SUBSCRIPTION_TIERS matches frontend config: Free=$0, Grom Basic=$2.99, Grom Premium=$7.99
get_tiers_for_role() helper correctly returns role-specific tiers
AccountBillingHub.js imports from centralized config using getPlansForRole()
SurferSubscription.js imports SURFER_PLANS from centralized config
PhotographerSubscription.js imports PHOTOGRAPHER_PLANS from centralized config

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Account & Billing Hub displays correct tier prices

context_for_next_testing_agent: Subscription Plan Sync fully tested. Key files: /app/frontend/src/config/subscriptionPlans.config.js (SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH), /app/backend/routes/subscriptions.py (backend tier definitions lines 239-313). Verified prices: Surfer Free=$0, Basic=$4.99, Premium=$14.99; Grom Free=$0, Basic=$2.99, Premium=$7.99; Photographer Basic=$18, Premium=$30.

P0_surfer_tier_prices.details: Backend returns correct Surfer tier prices: Free=$0, Basic=$4.99/mo, Premium=$14.99/mo

P0_grom_tier_prices.details: Backend GROM_SUBSCRIPTION_TIERS has correct prices: Free=$0, Grom Basic=$2.99/mo, Grom Premium=$7.99/mo

P0_role_specific_tiers.details: get_tiers_for_role() returns SURFER tiers for Surfer/Comp Surfer/Pro roles

P1_settings_ui_tier_display.details: Settings > Account & Billing shows 3 tier options with correct prices from centralized config
P1_settings_ui_tier_display.test_evidence: Playwright found tier-option-tier_1, tier-option-tier_2, tier-option-tier_3 with correct pricing

P1_grom_parent_linked_groms.details: Grom Parent can see linked Groms and manage their subscriptions

P1_stripe_checkout_integration.details: Tier upgrade initiates Stripe checkout with correct amount
